rows.notes: All extractors agreed on this header row, which is clearly visible.

rows.description: Domus Fund payment on aut of
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms 'Domus' (not 'Dormus') and 'aut' is transcribed as seen with a slight underline, implying an abbreviation for 'account', as noted by gemini-flash. No monetary amounts are present.

Selected gemini-flash. This row is clearly a 'total' for 'Brought forward'. Amounts '2045£ 2s 2d' are clearly visible in the respective columns. gpt-5-mini misread shillings as '7'. claude-haiku completely missed this row.

Selected gpt-5-mini. The description is accurate, and the amounts '17s 3d 1/2' are clearly visible in the shillings, pence, and fraction columns. gemini-flash misinterpreted the numbers as part of the description, and claude-haiku misread all amounts and part of the description.

Amounts '1£ 1s 8d' are clearly visible and correctly read by gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Description refined based on gpt-5-mini and visual to exclude the amount from the text. claude-haiku misread the description and all amounts.

Selected gemini-flash. The dash in the pounds column clearly indicates zero pounds. Amounts '18s 11d 1/2' are accurately read and are clearly visible. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly identified a pound value.

Selected gemini-flash. The description 'Colley Garden' is accurate. A ditto mark indicates zero pounds. Visually, '13s 13d' are clearly written. As noted by gemini-flash, 13 pence is an invalid currency value, reflecting an error in the original ledger. gpt-5-mini misread pounds and pence, and claude-haiku had a contradictory note regarding pence validity.

Selected claude-haiku. The description 'Reading Room' is accurate. Visually, a ditto mark indicates zero pounds, and '3s 3d' are clearly visible. gemini-flash misread amounts significantly (21s 29d), and gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '3' in pounds.

Selected gpt-5-mini. Description 'Frieze farm. Outlet for Water' is accurate. Amounts '21£ 2s 9d' are clearly visible. gemini-flash incorrectly reported no amounts. claude-haiku misread amounts and incorrectly added a fraction.

Selected gpt-5-mini. This row introduces a group of sub-items and has no amounts itself, correctly classified as a 'header' by gpt-5-mini. gemini-flash incorrectly labeled it as an 'entry'. claude-haiku entirely misidentified this row.

Selected gemini-flash. The amount '25' is clearly in the shillings column. As noted by gemini-flash, 25 shillings is an invalid currency value, reflecting the ledger as written. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '25' in pounds. claude-haiku entirely misidentified this row.

Selected gemini-flash. The amount '30' is clearly in the shillings column. As noted by gemini-flash, 30 shillings is an invalid currency value, reflecting the ledger as written. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '30' in pounds. claude-haiku entirely misidentified this row.

Selected gemini-flash. The amount '30' is clearly in the shillings column. As noted by gemini-flash, 30 shillings is an invalid currency value, reflecting the ledger as written. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '30' in pounds. claude-haiku entirely misidentified this row.

Selected gemini-flash. The description 'Salvocate' is accurate. The amounts '3£ 10s 15d' are clearly written with distinct column separation. As noted by gemini-flash and claude-haiku, 15 pence is an invalid currency value, reflecting the ledger as written. gpt-5-mini misinterpreted digit grouping and was highly uncertain.
Selected gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini. The amounts '73£ 8s 9d' are clearly visible and agreed by these two extractors. claude-haiku misread all amounts and invented a fraction.
Selected gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini. The amounts '3£ 16s 6d' are clearly visible and agreed by these two extractors. claude-haiku misread the description and pence amount.
The amounts '15£ 6s 6d' are in consensus across all three extractors and clearly visible. Description 'Domus Wine Ballots' refined based on visual, closest to gemini-flash.
The amounts '15£ 2s 6d' are in consensus across all three extractors and clearly visible. gemini-flash's description 'do do' is an exact match.

Selected amounts from gemini-flash. The amount '25' is clearly in the shillings column. As noted by gemini-flash, 25 shillings is an invalid currency value, reflecting the ledger as written. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '25' in pounds. Description from gpt-5-mini is most accurate.
Selected gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini. The amounts '42£ 7s 7d' are clearly visible and agreed by these two extractors. claude-haiku misread the shillings as '4'.

Selected gemini-flash. The amounts '22s 10d' are clearly visible in the shillings and pence columns, with no pounds amount. As noted by gemini-flash, 22 shillings is an invalid currency value, reflecting the ledger as written. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '22' in pounds. claude-haiku's extraction was largely incorrect.
Selected gpt-5-mini. The description and amounts '7£ 17s 4d' are accurately read and clearly visible. gemini-flash misread pounds as '9'. claude-haiku misread all amounts and description.

Selected gemini-flash. The description and amounts '14s 9d' are accurately read and clearly visible, with no pounds amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '14' in pounds. claude-haiku's extraction was incorrect.

Selected claude-haiku. The description and amount '18s' are accurately read and clearly visible, with no pounds or pence. gemini-flash incorrectly identified '3' pence (a stray mark). gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '18' in pounds.

Selected gemini-flash. The description and amounts '9£ 13s 2d' are accurately read and clearly visible. The note from gemini-flash incorrectly states 13 shillings is an invalid range. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread the amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. The description and amounts '12s 6d' are accurately read and clearly visible, with no pounds amount. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread the amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. The description and amounts '10s 3d' are accurately read and clearly visible, with no pounds amount. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread the amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. The description and amounts '10s 9d' are accurately read and clearly visible, with no pounds amount. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku misread the amounts.
Selected gemini-flash. The description 'Brown' is accurate, and no monetary amounts are visible for this row. gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku incorrectly extracted '10s 9d'.

Selected gemini-flash. The description 'Painting' is accurate, and the amount '1s' is clearly visible in the shillings column. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '1' in pounds. claude-haiku misread the description.
The amounts '6s 6d' are in consensus across all three extractors and clearly visible. Description 'Kidlington Cottages Comm' is the most accurate transcription.

Selected gpt-5-mini/claude-haiku. The description 'Roby' is accurate. The amounts '2£ 0s 11d' are clearly visible: '2' in pounds, a dash (zero) in shillings, and '11' in pence. gemini-flash misread '2' as part of shillings.

Selected gemini-flash/claude-haiku. The amounts '5s' are clearly visible in the shillings column. gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed '5' in pounds. Description refined to 'Chancel Wittham' based on visual.

The amounts '29£ 14s 6d' are in consensus across all three extractors and clearly visible. Description 'local Rate fund. Caster book' refined based on visual verification, matching gemini-flash closest for 'Caster'.

Selected gemini-flash. The description 'Stamps' is accurate. The amount '15' is clearly in the shillings column, and the trailing dash indicates no pence, as noted by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini noted ambiguity, but the column alignment is clear. claude-haiku misread the description.

Selected gpt-5-mini. The description 'Stringer Comm. on Tithes' is accurate. The amounts '9£ 1s 6d' are clearly visible in the pounds, shillings, and pence columns respectively. gemini-flash misread pounds as shillings and shillings as invalid pence. claude-haiku misread the values.
The amounts '6s 6d' are in consensus across all three extractors and clearly visible. Description 'Room Rent overpaid in Sust.' is the most accurate transcription.

Selected gemini-flash/gpt-5-mini. This row is clearly a 'total' for 'Carried forward'. The amounts '2774£ 7s 4d 1/2' are clearly visible and agreed by these two extractors. claude-haiku misread the pounds amount as '277'.
